entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume crop (Arachis hypogaea) affected by yellow mold

entities.name: YELLOW MOLD
entities.description: A disease of peanut seedlings causing rotting and chlorosis

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus that causes yellow mold and produces aflatoxins

entities.name: SOUTH TEXAS
entities.description: The region where the yellow mold outbreak was observed

entities.name: PREEMERGENCE ROTTING
entities.description: Rotting of seeds and seedlings before emergence caused by yellow mold

entities.name: CHLOROSIS
entities.description: Yellowing of plant tissue observed in diseased peanut plants

entities.name: STUNTING
entities.description: Reduced growth of diseased peanut plants

entities.name: REDUCED LEAFLET SIZE
entities.description: Decrease in the size of leaflets in infected peanut plants

entities.name: VEIN-CLEARING
entities.description: A symptom where veins in the leaves become transparent

entities.name: AFLATOXINS
entities.description: Toxins produced by Aspergillus flavus found in infected peanut cotyledons

entities.name: GREENHOUSE TESTS
entities.description: Experimental tests used to determine the pathogenicity of A. flavus isolates
